Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree

Class GUIOneStepChildTreeNode

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree.GUIAbstractTreeNode
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree.GUIOneStepChildTreeNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
TreeNode
public class GUIOneStepChildTreeNode extends GUIAbstractTreeNode
A special kind of gui proof tree node to show intermediate steps of the OneStepSimplifier. These nodes are leaves.
